privacy.notes: Metadata-only Kotlin/Native binding contract. It describes native adapter models without embedding calculator kernels, proprietary tables, or patient-level data.

calculator_contract_alignment.compatibility_policy: Keep request and response model names stable across Kotlin/Native consumers, and fail closed when the public calculator contract version or required column set changes.

surfaces.notes: Native call boundary to the shared Rust core after ABI ownership rules are versioned.
Batch and fixture-validation path for reproducible tabular interchange.
Fallback request/response path when native linking is not appropriate.

errors.message: calculator request is missing required public-contract fields
unsupported calculator or pricing year for the Kotlin/Native binding
native boundary unavailable and no declared fallback could be used

fixture_gates.description: Committed fixtures remain synthetic and metadata only.
Kotlin/Native models remain aligned to public calculator contract fields.
The binding contract requires no JVM runtime, Maven publication, or Gradle build.

kotlin_native.release_gate: adapter thin, native target matrix pinned, and parity stable
kotlin_native.notes: Future-only Kotlin/Native artifact; no generated binaries are committed.

c_abi.release_gate: ownership, symbol, and memory-safety rules versioned
c_abi.notes: Primary native boundary after ABI contract review.

service.notes: Fallback path for hosted request/response use.
